name: Video Interlude
description: Full-screen video playback page. Navigates to the next route when the video ends or when the user taps skip.
notes: Video src is read from CAPE path: general.video.introVideo (assetSelector field).
Add an assetSelector field at model=general.video.introVideo to the campaign format.
If the field is missing from CAPE, the page auto-skips straight to {{NEXT_AFTER_VIDEO}}.
The page auto-navigates to {{NEXT_AFTER_VIDEO}} when the video ends or the user taps Skip.
